courseTitle: Advanced AI, Simulation, and Procedural Systems
title: Grammar-Based Content Game
genericDescription: Use formal grammars or templates; generate coherent content; constrain combinatorial output.
specificDescription: Build a game that generates rooms, quests, dialogue, cards, levels, puzzles, or encounters from grammar rules. Include at least 20 possible outputs and a way to inspect generated structure.
gradingRubric: 30 pts grammar/system design; 20 pts content coherence; 20 pts gameplay integration; 15 pts inspection tool; 15 pts reflection.
